# Semble Code Search Gate MCP

Paid remote MCP for agent code search routing MCP, structured receipts, audit logs, and reviewer-ready evidence.

Website: https://semblecodesearchgate.clauxel.com/
MCP endpoint: https://semblecodesearchgate.clauxel.com/mcp
Server card: https://semblecodesearchgate.clauxel.com/server-card.json
Docs: https://github.com/clauxel/semble-code-search-gate-mcp

Use case: agent code search routing MCP with structured receipts.
Authentication: Bearer token required for production use.
Tools: route_code_search, explain_context_choice, issue_search_receipt, log_search_route, export_search_audit
